graded_findings.rationale: The gather evidence says this implementation plan was updated appropriately for the new dscli status behavior. This item is not an adherence gap.
The gather evidence says this design spec covers the new command interface, discovery behavior, and reporting flow. This item is not an adherence gap.
The shipped dscli user manual documents supported subcommands but omits the newly added status command. That is a real user-facing documentation gap and should block merge.
